title: Contract for public roads maintenance in Hiiu County
description: Nordecon Group company Tariston AS has entered into a contract with the Estonian Transport Administration for the maintenance of national roads in the Hiiu maintenance area for the period 2026–2031. The contract covers the year-round maintenance of approximately 470 kilometres of national roads in Hiiu County.
